tasks.instruction: Using the custom maintenance plan configurator, select the least expensive preventive maintenance module that costs at most $500, then the most expensive emergency support or 24/7 hotline module that keeps the running total at or below $1,000, add a spare parts management module and, if the budget allows, the lowest-cost inspection module, making sure the combined monthly cost does not exceed $1,500 before submitting the plan as a contract request.
